item.title: Driving a Large Farm Truck for the Day
item.description: A look at operating a large farm truck during a full workday. Covering driving tasks, hauling work, and the challenges of handling big equipment in the field.

media:content.media:title: Driving a Large Farm Truck for the Day
media:content.media:description: A look at operating a large farm truck during a full workday. Covering driving tasks, hauling work, and the challenges of handling big equipment in the field.

item.title: Skid-Steer Stuck in the Field
item.description: A farm skid-steer gets stuck during field work. A simple look at recovery efforts, ground conditions, and how equipment challenges are handled on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Skid-Steer Stuck in the Field
media:content.media:description: A farm skid-steer gets stuck during field work. A simple look at recovery efforts, ground conditions, and how equipment challenges are handled on the farm.

item.title: Impressive Farm Rig Discovery
item.description: A closer look at a powerful farm rig spotted during work. Exploring its setup, capabilities, and why it stands out in daily agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: Impressive Farm Rig Discovery
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a powerful farm rig spotted during work. Exploring its setup, capabilities, and why it stands out in daily agricultural operations.

item.title: Rookie Semi Driver Learning Moment
item.description: A beginner semi-truck driving experience on the farm. Focus on learning mistakes, handling a large truck, and building confidence behind the wheel.

media:content.media:title: Rookie Semi Driver Learning Moment
media:content.media:description: A beginner semi-truck driving experience on the farm. Focus on learning mistakes, handling a large truck, and building confidence behind the wheel.

item.title: Life Behind the Wheel on the Farm
item.description: A look at daily life operating farm trucks and machinery. Focus on driving, logistics, and the realities of working behind the wheel in agriculture.

media:content.media:title: Life Behind the Wheel on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at daily life operating farm trucks and machinery. Focus on driving, logistics, and the realities of working behind the wheel in agriculture.

item.title: 14-Hour Farm Equipment Pickup Trip
item.description: A long-distance 14-hour road trip to pick up farm equipment. Focus on travel, logistics, and the effort involved in moving machinery across long routes.

media:content.media:title: 14-Hour Farm Equipment Pickup Trip
media:content.media:description: A long-distance 14-hour road trip to pick up farm equipment. Focus on travel, logistics, and the effort involved in moving machinery across long routes.

item.title: Loading Burned Farm Equipment
item.description: A recovery operation involving burned farm equipment being loaded for transport. Focus on cleanup, heavy machinery handling, and dealing with damaged agricultural assets.

media:content.media:title: Loading Burned Farm Equipment
media:content.media:description: A recovery operation involving burned farm equipment being loaded for transport. Focus on cleanup, heavy machinery handling, and dealing with damaged agricultural assets.

item.title: Refreshing a Farm Combine Harvester
item.description: A combine harvester gets a full refresh and maintenance update. Focus on cleaning, repairs, and getting the machine ready for another productive season in the field.

media:content.media:title: Refreshing a Farm Combine Harvester
media:content.media:description: A combine harvester gets a full refresh and maintenance update. Focus on cleaning, repairs, and getting the machine ready for another productive season in the field.

item.title: Farm Auction Deal Hunting on a Working Farm
item.description: Exploring a farm auction to find useful equipment and tools. Focus on bidding process, farm gear, and smart buying decisions for agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: Farm Auction Deal Hunting on a Working Farm
media:content.media:description: Exploring a farm auction to find useful equipment and tools. Focus on bidding process, farm gear, and smart buying decisions for agricultural operations.

item.title: Farm Equipment Loaded and Ready to Go
item.description: Preparing and loading farm equipment for transport. Shows practical farm operations, organization, and getting machinery ready for the next job efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Farm Equipment Loaded and Ready to Go
media:content.media:description: Preparing and loading farm equipment for transport. Shows practical farm operations, organization, and getting machinery ready for the next job efficiently.
